case_title: ROMAC INTERNATIONAL vs. OMNIS SOFTWARE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF TO FILE UNDERTAKING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMAC INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMNIS SOFTWARE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $158.52 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,908.52 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
